_metadata.purpose: Block legacy authentication protocols (POP, IMAP, SMTP-Basic, MAPI, EWS-Basic) that cannot enforce MFA.
deployment_notes: Replace <group-id-break-glass> with the object ID of your break-glass account exclusion group.
Start in enabledForReportingButNotEnforced (report-only) mode. Monitor sign-in logs for legitimate legacy clients.
After 7-14 days with no legitimate hits, switch state to 'enabled'.
Common legitimate legacy clients to identify: old iOS Mail app, printers/MFPs using SMTP-Basic, line-of-business apps using EWS-Basic. Migrate or whitelist before enforcing.
